description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display on the front. The front screen has a prominent notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera, and displays a colorful abstract wallpaper. The back is glossy black with a centered silver Apple logo and a dual-camera module with flash in the top left corner. The sides are slim and black, with visible physical buttons for volume and power. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a solid, premium build. Its compact size and ergonomic design make it suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a silver Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a notch and colorful wallpaper.
description_view_1: Left edge view highlighting the slim profile and visible side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the glossy black finish, silver Apple logo, and dual camera module.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the thinness and additional side buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting against the glossy black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, white, pink, and purple shapes; no icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged in a vertical module at the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible: two on the left edge (likely volume up/down) and one on the right edge (likely the power button), all elongated and flush with the surface.
